preamble: The insertion of a lateral consonant /l/ triggered by the presence of a high front vowel or glide /i/, often to resolve hiatus or as a dialectal feature.

examples.note: Hypercorrection or intrusive L after high vowels.
L-epenthesis between labial and palatal glide /j/.

sources: Shevelov, G. Y. (1964). A Prehistory of Slavic.
